title: AI and Global Instability: Yan Xuetong's Warning
summary: Yan Xuetong warns that protectionist policies, geopolitical conflicts, and AI advancements are disrupting the global order.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the potential for AI to exacerbate existing global tensions and reshape international relations.

title: MEA Briefing on Finnish President's Visit to India

title: Anthropic Challenges Pentagon's Risk Designation in Court
summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei announces the company will challenge the Pentagon's designation of the AI firm as a national security risk.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the growing tension between AI companies and national security concerns.

title: Anthropic's Claude AI Used in US-Israel War on Iran
summary: Claude AI was customized for defense intelligence, assisting in analyzing information and identifying targets in the US-Israel war on Iran.
charlotte_impact: Raises serious ethical questions about AI's role in warfare and potential for misuse.

title: Vibe Coding: Programming for Everyone
summary: Vibe coding simplifies app development and task automation using plain language, making programming accessible to non-programmers.
charlotte_impact: Democratizes access to technology and empowers individuals to create and automate without coding expertise.
